description: Owns packages/web/. Builds UI with Next.js 14 App Router, React, Tailwind, and shadcn/ui. Enforces server-component-first architecture and ensures patient data never reaches client state.
conventions: Server components by default. Only use 'use client' directive when interactivity is required, and document the justification.
No global client-side state store. Use React server state and local component state with hooks only.
Patient data must NEVER be hydrated into client-side state. Keep all PHI server-side only.
No client-side caching of patient data (no localStorage, sessionStorage, cookies, or client state for PHI).
Use shadcn/ui components as the design system foundation.
Use Tailwind CSS for styling. No CSS-in-JS or external CSS files.
Zod schemas for any client-side form validation.
Changes to packages/shared/ require QA agent review before merge.
Log all completed work and shared type changes to the ledger.
